documents.title: M1K3 System Introduction
documents.content: M1K3 is a privacy-focused local AI assistant with voice synthesis, web dashboard, and CLI interfaces. It features multi-backend AI with TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat, real-time avatar visualization, and PWA deployment. All processing is done locally for maximum privacy.

documents.title: Basic Python Variable Declaration
documents.content: In Python, you create variables by simply assigning values: x = 5, name = 'Alice', is_active = True. Python automatically determines the type based on the value. Variables can be reassigned to different types at any time.

documents.title: Simple Arithmetic Operations
documents.content: Basic math operations in programming: addition (+), subtraction (-), multiplication (*), division (/). For example: 5 + 3 = 8, 10 - 4 = 6, 7 * 2 = 14, 15 / 3 = 5. These operations follow standard mathematical rules.

documents.title: Common Python Debugging: NameError
documents.content: NameError occurs when Python cannot find a variable or function name. Common causes: typos, using variables before defining them, or scope issues. Solution: check spelling, ensure variables are defined before use, and verify variable scope.

documents.title: Friendly Greeting Response
documents.content: Hi there! I'm M1K3, your local AI assistant. I'm here to help with programming questions, math calculations, explanations, or just have a friendly chat. What can I help you with today?

documents.title: Multiplication Problem: 14 × 3
documents.content: To multiply 14 × 3, think of it as adding 14 to itself 3 times. 14 × 3 = 42. Multiplication is repeated addition.

documents.title: Percentage Calculation: 50% of 155
documents.content: To find 50% of 155, multiply by 0.5: 155 × 0.5 = 77.5. Percentages are fractions out of 100.

documents.title: Percentage Calculation: 30% of 130
documents.content: To find 30% of 130, multiply by 0.3: 130 × 0.3 = 39.0. Percentages are fractions out of 100.
